details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material. Learn more

about_item: Indestructible & Dog-Safe: Crafted with a premium aluminum alloy frame and chew-proof edges, this bed withstands aggressive chewers while keeping your pup’s gums safe and happy.
Rock-Solid Stability: Built with a heavy-duty steel frame, this bed supports up to 250 lbs. of playful energy, with non-slip feet to stay firmly in place for even the most spirited dogs.
Durable & Low-Maintenance Investment: Gain peace of mind with SGS’s 15-year lifespan-tested durability. Clean with a quick wipe for a smart, lasting investment.
Gentle Joint Support: Elevated at the perfect height to support developing joints and relieve pressure on aging hips, making hopping on/off effortless for both puppies and senior dogs.
Ready in a Snap: Pop it up in just 90 seconds with no tools needed! Lightweight and portable, it’s perfect for home, travel, or easy storage without the fuss.

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed durable, with one noting it's still intact after months of use, and appreciate its quality and chew-proof design. The bed is easy to assemble, arrives fully put together, and is simple to clean. While some customers like the built-in padding, others find it not very cushioned. Customers consider it worth the price.

examples.snippet: ...well, but the most important thing I found with this one is that it is padded....

authors_reviews.title: XL is perfect for my GSD!
authors_reviews.text: I am quite impressed with this XL bed and my 125# GSD agrees (so does my cat)! It was easy to assemble, it looks great and it's well made - I forsee it lasting a really long time. I also love the fact that I can easily vacuum and wipe it down.
authors_reviews.author: Monica

authors_reviews.title: Very Strong and Comfortable Bed.
authors_reviews.text: We have had these beds (03 of them) for our dogs (Pitbulls) and they are amazing, very strong, easy to wash and clean, easy to assembly and very comfortable, they really love the bed, it takes no scratches from the dogs and they have been the only one that have lasted so long and they are still in very good condition.The main frame and legs are made out of aluminum and the corners are chew proof really, they are kind of a very hard and thick plastic that they haven't been able to break it yet and they won't for sure.I would buy this beds with no doubt at all.
authors_reviews.author: Robmarth

authors_reviews.title: Solid choice!
authors_reviews.text: My girl has taken to laying on this to sun, especially when the ground is on the colder side. I originally bought this for a kennel and it was great for that too! Now, I just have it in the back yard. I was hopeful she would use it but didn't really show much interest until the ground got cold. This thing is nice with it's little bit if padding! It's lightweight and east to move and use in different ways, you can even take the legs off which came in handy when using in a kennel! It is also solid, I originally had a 95lb dog on it with no issues!
authors_reviews.author: MHuller

authors_reviews.title: Fantastic Quality!
authors_reviews.text: Rescued this little female husky a few months ago and she loves crates and often lounges in them on her own, but eats every bed in them. I had to find a bed that’ll hold up against her and an aluminum framed one did the trick. Now this cot is the same quality as the higher priced version (which I also have one of) and is just as good. Photos referenced are of my 45lb female husky on a 42 inch bed.Pros: So easy to put together. You just either attach the legs on or not, that’s it! Fabric is smooth surprisingly cushioned vinyl feeling and very strong. Pay attention to the fabric for each size specifically though! My female husky has dug in it again and again and again and hasn’t made a dent in it.Cons: Sizing. If you have a 36 inch dog crate for example, the 36 in bed will not fit in it (trust me, I tried that one first and had to return it because it was too big for the crate!) I ended up using my other dog’s 48 inch crate that I already had for her, and bought the 42 inch bed and it fits perfectly with some extra space.So in summary, wonderful quality as a regular indoor or outdoor bed! Price is absolutely fair for this quality. It’s very stable and my dog loves it! Con is it’s not really the best bed for a crate unless you size up your crate, or size down the bed. I give it five out of five stars either way!
authors_reviews.author: Kate G.

authors_reviews.title: Durable dog cot
authors_reviews.text: My puppy started chewing up beds and blankets in his crate around 6 months old and I decided to try a cot in his kennel. I found a much cheaper cot and he dug through the material one night. I’ve had this 42” cot inside his 48” crate for 8 months and absolutely no rips or tears. It’s sturdy and stable, which is great considering he’s now 100 lbs. He digs on his cot before laying down and I’m amazed at how well this is holding up. I clean it every couple weeks in the shower with some dawn dish soap, then let it air dry overnight. I like to have an extra cot for cleaning days to swap out while the other dries. I was so hesitant on spending this much after other “chew proof” beds were destroyed, but this one is definitely worth the price! The only con I’ve found is with the rubber feet falling off. They keep the cot stable and prevent the floors from getting scratched, but they fall out easily and I currently have 1 missing. Since I use it in his crate, it’s not a big deal, but it would be nice if they’d make those fit securely in the bottoms.
authors_reviews.author: Papillon Mama

authors_reviews.title: Nice, but missing cover.
authors_reviews.text: Ordered Thursday night, it arrived Fed Ex Saturday afternoon. But it is missing the cover—that significantly raised the price. It looks nice and sturdy for my 130# dog. But I can’t set it up/assemble the legs until I know if the seller will send the cover or if I have to return it.Padding is built-in to the fabric. Looks easily washable. But I don’t know how much water might get into the frame if I hose it off or it gets rained on.
authors_reviews.author: Murphys Law

authors_reviews.title: Tough, comfortable, excellent quality beds!
authors_reviews.text: I initially bought a TitanNest chew-proof elevated bed for a rescue who chews *everything* and came back to buy two more for my other dogs. The original bed has lasted without any damage and she loves to sleep on it. We're in the Northeast US so we put a few blankets on top and that makes it even cozier. Because the beds are elevated, they keep dogs warmer than putting a fabric bed down on cold hardwood floors. Couldn't be happier with these beds! They're easy to assemble, the weight is appropriate to the size... they're just great beds!
authors_reviews.author: K

authors_reviews.title: Happy fur babies, unable to destroy
authors_reviews.text: I have an excessive chewer. This was the first item that she was unable to chew. She also loves the bed. Ended up recommending purchasing multiple times for different family members. Everyone was completely satisfied to include all fur babies.
authors_reviews.author: Mia
